task_completion.description: Create the SENPOLL campaign with specified settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: Vicidial campaign creation or modification screen showing Campaign ID 'SENPOLL', Campaign Name 'Senate Office Polling 2026', Active set to 'Y', Dial Method set to 'RATIO', and Auto Dial Level set to '1.0'.

task_completion.description: Add the four required custom campaign statuses to SENPOLL
task_completion.visual_evidence: Vicidial custom campaign statuses screen for the SENPOLL campaign showing the addition of statuses: 'SVYCMP' (Human Answer: Y), 'REFUSD' (Human Answer: Y), 'LFTMSG' (Human Answer: N), and 'WRGPRS' (Human Answer: Y).

task_completion.description: Create the SENPOLLSC script with the required text
task_completion.visual_evidence: Vicidial script creation or modification screen showing Script ID 'SENPOLLSC', Script Name 'Senate Polling Script', and the script text containing the required keywords (National Policy Research, constituent services, legislative priorities).

task_completion.description: Assign the SENPOLLSC script to the SENPOLL campaign
task_completion.visual_evidence: Vicidial campaign detail screen for SENPOLL showing 'SENPOLLSC' selected in the Script dropdown or assignment field.

task_completion.description: Assign list 9001 to the SENPOLL campaign
task_completion.visual_evidence: Vicidial list modification screen showing List ID '9001' with its Campaign assigned to 'SENPOLL'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Vicidial web interface to configure the campaign
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Vicidial administration panel, rather than terminal commands, API calls, or direct database manipulation.

integrity.description: Agent actually interacted with the forms and submitted them
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show form fields being actively filled out and confirmation messages of successful creation/modification within the Vicidial interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not just write the configuration details into a text file
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration is visible within the actual Vicidial web application UI, not in a notepad, text editor, or terminal window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Campaign ID must be 'SENPOLL' and Campaign Name 'Senate Office Polling 2026'. Script ID must be 'SENPOLLSC'. The campaign must be linked to List ID '9001'. The required custom statuses are 'SVYCMP', 'REFUSD', 'LFTMSG', and 'WRGPRS'. The script text must include the keywords 'National Policy Research', 'constituent services', and 'legislative priorities'.
